memoryArtifacts.headline: Catherine of Cleves kneels before the Virgin and Child. Her arms, with those of her husband, Duke Arnold of Guelders, are in the bottom center; the arms of her ancestors are in each corner. (Via Wikipedia)
(Mary’s mother, Catherine of Cleves, distributing alms to the poor, as portrayed in one of her books of hours)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine von Cleves於1417年5月25日出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福時，她的父親Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.43歲，母親Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve24歲。她於1430年1月26日與Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可列福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年2月10日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德洛比斯享年61歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine von Cleves于1417年5月25日出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福时，她的父亲Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.43岁，母亲Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve24岁。她于1430年1月26日与Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可列福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年2月10日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德洛比斯享年61岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 韋塞爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: Jonathan
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Cleves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Cleave (see Cliff ), with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cleave
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): variant of   Cliff  .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine von Cleves was born on 25 May 1417, in Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve., was 43 and her mother, Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve, was 24. She married Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres on 26 January 1430, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 10 February 1479, in Lobith, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 61, and was buried in Wesel, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine von Cleves est née le 25 mai 1417, à Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve., avait 43 ans et sa mère, Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres le 26 janvier 1430, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1479, à Lobith, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine von Cleves am 25. Mai 1417 in Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. 43 und ihre Mutter Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve 24. Sie hat am 26. Januar 1430 in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1479 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Lobith, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine von Cleves è nata il il 25 maggio 1417 nel Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve., aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres il 26 gennaio 1430, nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 febbraio 1479, nel Lobith, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine von Clevesが1417年5月25日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブで生まれた時，父Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.は43歳，母Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleveは24歳であった。1430年1月26日にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブでArnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年2月10日にオランダジェルダーランドロビスで61歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ウエセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine von Cleves(이)가 1417년 5월 25일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve.(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1430년 1월 26일 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 클브에서 Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 2월 10일 네덜란드 글델랜드 로비스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 크레이스 웨셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine von Cleves nasceu em 25 de maio de 1417, em Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve., tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres em 26 de janeiro de 1430, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1479, em Lobith, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine von Cleves родилась 25 мая 1417 г. в местности клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve. было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres 26 января 1430 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 февраля 1479 г. в местности лобит, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности крис весел, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine von Cleves nació el 25 de mayo de 1417, en Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Adolf I von Kleve Herzog von Kleve., tenía 43 años y su mamá, Marie de Bourgogne Herzogin von Kleve, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Arnoud van Egmond Duke de Gueldres el 26 de enero de 1430, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1479, en Lobith, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Kreis Wesel, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
